title: Glass City Art Walk & Lunch
description: Start at North America's largest mural, walk through downtown Toledo's best public art, and finish with lunch at a historic pub. About 3 miles, 2-3 hours at a leisurely pace.

stops.note: Start here — the largest mural in North America. Take in all 28 silos from the east bank of the Maumee River.
Head north along the river to this postcard-style mural celebrating Toledo landmarks.
Continue to Promenade Park. Walk through the eleven steel rings — remnants of a steam plant smokestack.
Just north on Summit St, look up — two suspended ovals that glow with LEDs at night.
Head into downtown to find this vibrant frog mural by local artist Dean Davis.
A short walk to the Peace Love Happiness HQ for another colorful Davis mural.
Stop into The Loft 419 to see Dean Davis's rotating gallery of mixed-media paintings.
End your tour with lunch at Ye Olde Cock & Bull. Check out the pub mural while you're there!
